repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #92654 in place by addressing the hydrated review-bot blockers for Control UI webchat right-click Reply while preserving programmingWTF's source PR attribution.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(control-ui): repair webchat reply context menu
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing #92654 right-click Reply implementation in place.
- Address review-bot blockers around context menu suppression, Escape/listener cleanup, DOM construction, focus/menu semantics, reply target clearing, stable reply identifiers, Markdown escaping, and unrelated CSS churn.
- Preserve programmingWTF's source PR attribution for the Control UI webchat Reply feature.

## Source credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92654
- Contributor credit: programmingWTF

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Repair existing contributor PR #92654; preserve attribution for programmingWTF as the source PR author.
PR body/changelog should mention that the fix carries forward the right-click Reply contribution from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92654.
